prior_cycle.note: Prior spec-phase B-class findings preserved in commit 9738d7b as an earlier version of this file.

findings.finding: No grep excludes Markdown comment blocks, fenced code blocks, or stale-section insertions. File already has HTML comment at line 71 — rule text stranded in <\!--  --> or deprecated example blocks could satisfy every gate.
Task 7 pytest is circular with per-task greps — same string-presence predicate executed by different tool; not an independent signal.
findings.evidence_quote: pytest module asserting R1-R7 strings are present in decompose.md

findings.finding: E10 invariant (consolidation cannot reduce flagged set to zero) explicitly obligated as prose by Task 4 but Verification greps only on R5 propagation strings. Invariant sentence is droppable without test catching it.
findings.evidence_quote: The E10 invariant follows from the propagation rule — state it explicitly in the prose

findings.finding: E6 integration (drop event + section 6 Dropped Items + ack choice) split across Tasks 3/5/6 with each piece verified individually; cross-referencing not verified — three disconnected prose pieces pass all greps.
findings.evidence_quote: E6 — User chooses Drop this item: item dropped, decompose_drop logged, recorded in section 6 Dropped Items subsection

findings.finding: E5 originating-input surfacing for merged flagged items not anchored in any grep. Task 3 Context mentions it but neither Task 3 nor Task 4 Verification greps for originating/originally-flagged.
findings.evidence_quote: surface the originating flagged input Value + premise

findings.finding: E3/E4 cap branches merged in Task 3 grep via alternation — single match on either branch satisfies verification, so branch-comprehensive coverage is untested.
findings.evidence_quote: grep -c more than 3 OR all items are flagged >= 1

findings.finding: Orchestration location backwards — decompose_flag/ack/drop events fire at section 2 user approval (Task 3) but schema block lives at section 3a. Readers at fire site scroll past section 3 Consolidation Review to find event shapes.
findings.evidence_quote: Place the block after section 3 Consolidation Review (e.g., as a new section 3a Event Logging)

findings.finding: Tasks 4 and 6 both touch section 3 boundary without explicit merge-order rule. Task 4 appends propagation paragraph inside section 3; Task 6 inserts new section 3a heading immediately after — adjacent-line edits with unspecified ordering.
findings.evidence_quote: Task 4: Add R5 flag propagation to section 3 ... Task 6: Place block after section 3

findings.finding: just test runs full aggregate suite (test-pipeline + test-overnight + pytest tests/) with no scope mechanism. Unrelated flakes block Task 8 even when R1-R9 correctly implemented.
findings.evidence_quote: Run just test — pass if exit 0 and recipe summary reports zero failures

findings.finding: No failure-recovery path specified for partial rule insertion. Task 8 binary pass/fail with no iteration loop if pytest test fails because one R-rule missing while others present.
